sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 END name, width, colname FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT boardid, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END boardname, treevieworder, boardlevel, parentboardid, boarddescription, itemexpires, attachsizelimit, replynotify, boardgroupid, alertpostitem, gubun, url, deleteafter, boardno, portlet, onelinereply, boardtreepath, formlocation, formflag, apprflag, apprmailflag, attributeyn, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#

SELECT boardid, accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath# LIMIT 1

SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
AND A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND startdate < #lastDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND startdate <= #lastDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND startdate <= #lastDate# AND enddate < #nowDate#
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.boardid , A.itemid , A.writerid , A.writername , A.writerdeptname , A.writercompanyname , DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.writedate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance , A.title , A.readcount , A.attachments , A.itemlevel , A.abstract , '0' readflag , A.extensionattribute5 , A.writername2 , A.writerdeptname2 , A.writercompanyname2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.ITEMID) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, A.extensionattribute2 notice, A.notino, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) as gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND A.apprflag = 'Y' ORDER BY A.parentwritedate, A.writedate DESC
ORDER BY A.notino ASC, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT DISTINCT B.apprflag FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = #boardID#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate < #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
AND apprflag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate < #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND apprflag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(itemid) totalcount FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardDd# AND startdate < #nowDate# AND enddate < #nowDate#
AND apprflag = 'Y'

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(itemid) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1'

SELECT A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY)
AND A.STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND S.USERID = #userID# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY))) ORDER BY A.writedate DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.BOARDNAME , A.BOARDNAME2 , TABUSED , B.GUBUN FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( USERID = #userID# OR USERID = 'everyone' ) AND TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYNAME$lang$ WRITERCOMPANYNAME, WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3$lang$ EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , A.APPRFLAG , B.GUBUN , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.BOARDID , A.DOCNO FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#,
Attachments = #hasAttach#,
WriterName = #writerName#, WriterName2 = #writerName2#,
ExtensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassword#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.gubun, '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT boardid , accessid , access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND parentboardid = #rootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND write_fg = 'true' AND boardid <> #excludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #userID# OR accessid = #deptID# OR accessid = #companyID# ) ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID BoardID, A.BoardName BoardName, CASE WHEN (A.boardname2 = '' OR A.boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.boardname ELSE A.boardname2 END BoardName2, A.TreeViewOrder TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor , A.Gubun , B.BOARDGROUPACL BOARDGROUPACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A JOIN ( SELECT C.BoardID , C.AccessID , C.Access_ , C.BoardGroupACL , C.tenant_id FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage C LEFT JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo D ON C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND C.BoardID = D.BoardID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.Access_ = 1 AND C.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# AND ( C.AccessID = #userID# ) AND D.ParentBoardID = #rootBoardID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.BoardID , A.BoardName , CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END BoardName2, A.TreeViewOrder , A.BoardColor BoardColor, A.Gubun , '' BoardGroupACL FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID# AND A.BoardID <> #excludeBoardID# ORDER BY A.TreeViewOrder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(AccessID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardAdmin_FG = 'true' AND ( AccessID = #userID# OR AccessID = #deptID# OR AccessID = #companyID# OR AccessID = 'everyone' ) AND BoardID = ( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardID = #boardID# )
SELECT CONCAT(BOARDID, ';') BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ACCESS_ = 0 AND ACCESSID = #accessID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #rootBoardID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND UserID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) AND A.StartDate < #nowDate# AND A.StartDate > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.EndDate > #nowDate# AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_MyBoards ( USERID, BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TREEVIEWNUM, VIEWORDER, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #userID# USERID , BOARDID , BOARDNAME , BOARDNAME2 , ( SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) + 1 FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ), ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(VIEWORDER) IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE MAX(VIEWORDER) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ), TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE USERID = #userID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY GUID
SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) as deptPathCode FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #departmentID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , MAIN_FLAG FLAG , IMAGENAME FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID# ORDER BY WriteDate ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BoardID = #boardID#
